description: Creates a 2D graph configured for trigonometric or inverse trigonometric functions with pi-based axis labels and tick marks.
utility: Create a 2D graph with pi-based scales for trig (sin, cos, tan) or inverse trig (arcsin, arccos, arctan)

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Logical position using at(row, col) coordinates on the canvas grid

arguments.name: size/height
arguments.description: Geometry mode: single size value. Plotting mode: row height

arguments.name: range
arguments.description: X-axis range, can use pi expressions like range(-2*pi, 2*pi, pi/4)

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: MANDATORY. type(trig): pi-based scale on both axes. type(invtrig): pi-based on y-axis only

alternates.syntax: g2d(at(row, col), height, width, range(-2*pi, 2*pi), range(-2, 2), type(trig))
alternates.description: Both axes use pi-based labels for sin/cos/tan

alternates.syntax: g2d(at(row, col), height, width, range(-1, 1), range(-pi, pi), type(invtrig))
alternates.description: Y-axis uses pi-based labels for arcsin/arccos/arctan

examples.expression: G = g2d(at(2,2), 25, 35, range(-pi, pi, pi/4), range(-1.5, 1.5), type(trig))
G = g2d(at(2,2), 20, 30, range(-1, 1), range(-pi/2, pi/2), type(invtrig))
